rulings.Case Title: JOSEPH TOCCHINI VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant The Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company'S Motion To Preclude Any Evidence Of Exposure Allegations Against It Made By Plaintiff After The Close Of Discovery
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Discovery Calendar for Monday, September 20, 2010 in Department 220 at 11:15 a.m., Line 1. Defendant The Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company¿s motion to preclude any evidence of exposure allegations against it made after the close of discovery is granted in part. If plaintiff wishes to support his claims against Goodyear by introducing evidence of his exposure to Cranite, then the trial will be continued to enable Goodyear to take appropriate discovery and file a summary judgment motion as to Cranite exposure. Plaintiff¿s failure to serve his June 2008 responses to Crane Co.¿s discovery on Goodyear coupled with what appears to be plaintiff¿s failure to have made a reasonable and good faith effort to include information regarding Cranite exposure in his June 2008 responses to Goodyear¿s discovery warrants exclusion of Cranite exposure evidence against Goodyear absent a trial continuance to enable Goodyear to take necessary discovery and have a motion for summary judgment heard. = (220/HEK)
